coat_colors: all shades of red, sable, brindle, blue merle, black

description.overview: The older of the two Corgi breeds, Cardigans have a tail and rounder ears. They're versatile, affectionate dogs who were bred to herd cattle by nipping at heels.
description.history: The Cardigan Welsh Corgi originated in Wales.
description.temperament: Known for being affectionate, loyal, smart.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their medium-length double coat coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: The older of the two Corgi breeds, Cardigans have a tail and rounder ears. They're versatile, affectionate dogs who were bred to herd cattle by nipping at heels.
